name: Crock Pot Braciole
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds Round steak (1/4 to 1/2 inch thick)
10 Large Tomatoes or 2 28 oz cans Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all excess fat from the round steak and cut into 8 evenly shaped pieces.
2. Pound steak pieces between waxed paper until very thin and easy to roll.
3. In a skillet, lightly brown the sausage and drain well. Combine with parsley, oregano, garlic, onion, and salt; mix well.
4. Spread each steak with 2 to 3 tablespoons of sausage mixture. Roll up the steaks and tie securely.
5. Stack the steak rolls in the crock pot.
6. In a separate container within the crock pot, combine tomatoes, tomato paste, salt, and oregano. Pour over the steak rolls.
7. Cover and cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours.
8. Serve steak rolls with sauce.
9. SAUCE: Place all ingredients except flour, oil, and vinegar in the crock pot; stir well. Cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours.
10. Remove cover and turn to high setting for the last hour to reduce excess moisture.
11. Before removing sauce from the crock pot, stir in flour, oil, and vinegar. Allow to cool.
12. Blend 3 cups of sauce at a time until smooth.
